name: Prior Auth MAF
postAttachCommand: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/.devcontainer-setup-running ]; then echo ""; echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"; echo "║  ⏳  ENVIRONMENT SETUP IN PROGRESS — PLEASE WAIT            ║"; echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  The post-create script is still installing dependencies:   ║"; echo "║    • Azure CLI  • azd  • Python packages  • npm packages    ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  DO NOT run azd up until setup is complete.                 ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  Monitor progress in the \"Creation Log\" (Codespaces menu)  ║"; echo "║  or wait for the ✅ message below to appear.                ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"; echo ""; elif [ -f /tmp/.devcontainer-setup-complete ]; then echo ""; echo "✅  Environment setup complete — ready to deploy!"; echo "    Run: azd auth login && az login && azd up"; echo ""; else echo ""; echo "ℹ️   Run .devcontainer/setupEnv.sh if tools are missing."; echo ""; fi'
